title: sagina nodosa var. borealis
intro: Sagina nodosa var. borealis, commonly known as northern starwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, attributed to its content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of sagina nodosa var. borealis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and stomach cramps, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Sagina nodosa var. borealis can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
